text:
This sounds like the jaw profile on your press tool doesn't match the fitting series. The most common cause is using a standard jaw on a fitting that requires a specific profile, like Geberit Mapress or Viega Propress.

First, check the marking on the fitting — it should indicate the required jaw type. If the jaw is correct, inspect it for wear; a worn jaw will slip on smaller diameters.

If you need a replacement jaw set or a compatible fitting, see below.
